description_long: This rifle features a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the handguard and pistol grip, giving it a classic yet robust appearance. The stock is a minimalist, skeletonized metal design, likely intended for portability and reduced weight. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, which is slightly curved and positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. At the muzzle, a cylindrical suppressor is attached, extending the length of the barrel and indicating a focus on noise reduction. Iron sights are present, with the front sight post visible above the suppressor and a rear notch integrated into the receiver. The overall design suggests a compact, urban-oriented firearm suitable for close-quarters scenarios.
description: A compact black rifle with wooden handguard and grip, skeletonized metal stock, detachable box magazine, and a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor's circular end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the wooden handguard and grip, curved magazine, skeletonized stock, and full suppressor length.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the skeletonized stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver and suppressor.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the wooden components, magazine, and the suppressor, mirroring the right side but with different lighting on the wood.
